UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the InterviewSense application, storing application-specific data linked to their authentication.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firebaseUserId.description: The unique identifier provided by Firebase Authentication for the user. (Relationship: Firebase Auth User 1:1 UserProfile)

email.description: The user's email address, primarily for display purposes.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

knowledgeCredits.description: The number of knowledge credits accumulated by the user through interactions and correct answers.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a single continuous chat conversation between a user and the AI assistant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Conversation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who initiated or owns this conversation. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Conversation)

title.description: A brief, auto-generated or user-provided title summarizing the conversation's topic.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated with a new message.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a single message exchange (user query or AI response) within a conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Message entity.

conversationId.description: Reference to the Conversation this message belongs to. (Relationship: Conversation 1:N Message)

sender.description: Indicates who sent the message: 'user' or 'ai'.

text.description: The textual content of the message, either user's question or AI's response.

audioUrl.description: Optional URL to the audio recording of the message (user's speech or AI's spoken response).

detectedDomain.description: The domain automatically detected by the AI for the user's question (e.g., 'Programming', 'HR Interview').

responseTitle.description: The title provided by the AI for its structured response.

explanation.description: The explanation part of the AI's structured response.

exampleOrCode.description: The sample answer or code example part of the AI's structured response.

tipsOrOptimization.description: The key tips or optimization suggestions part of the AI's structured response.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was created.

InterviewSession.title: InterviewSession
InterviewSession.description: Represents a single mock interview session conducted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InterviewSession entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who started this interview session. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N InterviewSession)

domain.description: The specific domain chosen for the mock interview (e.g., 'Software Developer', 'HR Interview').

status.description: The current status of the interview session (e.g., 'started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

overallScore.description: The aggregated score for the entire interview session, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the interview session was started.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the interview session was last updated.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the interview session was marked as completed.

InterviewQuestion.title: InterviewQuestion
InterviewQuestion.description: Represents a single question asked by the AI during a mock interview session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InterviewQuestion entity.

interviewSessionId.description: Reference to the InterviewSession this question belongs to. (Relationship: InterviewSession 1:N InterviewQuestion)

questionText.description: The text of the question posed by the AI.

questionType.description: The category or type of the question (e.g., 'technical', 'behavioral', 'aptitude').

sequenceNumber.description: The sequential order of this question within the interview session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this question was generated and presented.

InterviewAnswer.title: InterviewAnswer
InterviewAnswer.description: Represents a user's answer to a specific interview question and the AI's subsequent evaluation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InterviewAnswer entity.

interviewQuestionId.description: Reference to the InterviewQuestion this answer corresponds to. (Relationship: InterviewQuestion 1:1 InterviewAnswer)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who provided this answer. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N InterviewAnswer)

answerText.description: The textual content of the user's answer, derived from speech-to-text or direct input.

audioUrl.description: Optional URL to the audio recording of the user's spoken answer.

clarityFeedback.description: AI's feedback on the clarity of the user's answer.

confidenceFeedback.description: AI's feedback on the confidence conveyed in the user's answer.

technicalAccuracyFeedback.description: AI's feedback on the technical accuracy of the user's answer.

improvementSuggestions.description: AI's suggestions for improving the user's answer.

score.description: A numerical score assigned by the AI for this specific answer.

knowledgeCreditsEarned.description: The number of knowledge credits earned for this answer.

evaluatedAt.description: Timestamp when the AI completed the evaluation of this answer.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Each document's `firebaseUserId` field must match the `{userId}` path parameter for authorization independence. Access is restricted to the authenticated user whose `uid` matches `{userId}`.

Contains a user's chat conversations with the AI. Each document includes the `userId` field, which must be denormalized from the parent path, to enable direct authorization checks (`request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId`) without requiring a `get()` call.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this conversation.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conversation.

definition.description: Stores individual messages within a conversation. Each message document must include a denormalized `userId` (matching the user's `uid`) and `conversationId` (matching the parent conversation's ID) for authorization independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this message's conversation.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent conversation.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.

definition.description: Stores records of mock interview sessions. Each document includes the `userId` field, which must be denormalized from the parent path, to enable direct authorization checks (`request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId`).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this interview session.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the interview session.

definition.description: Stores questions asked by the AI during a specific interview session. Each document must include a denormalized `userId` (matching the user's `uid`) and `interviewSessionId` (matching the parent session's ID) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this interview session.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent interview session.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the interview question.

definition.description: Stores the user's answer and AI's evaluation for a specific interview question. This is a sub-document with a fixed ID (`answer`) due to its 1:1 relationship with `InterviewQuestion`. It includes denormalized `userId`, `interviewSessionId`, and `interviewQuestionId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who provided this answer.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent interview session.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent interview question.

firestore.reasoning: The recommended Firestore structure for InterviewSense prioritizes security, scalability, and debuggability by adhering to core design principles, especially Authorization Independence and Structural Segregation. All user-specific data is nested under a top-level `/userProfiles/{userId}` collection. This enforces path-based ownership, making authorization rules straightforward and highly efficient.
